title: [BUS] Implement MIL-STD-1553 bus protocol adapter
body:
## Objective
Bridge CommandStore entries to equipment model interfaces over a simulated MIL-STD-1553 bus.

## Background
Spacecraft internal commanding between OBC and equipment (reaction wheels, sensors) commonly uses MIL-STD-1553. This adapter simulates the bus timing and addressing behaviour.

## Acceptance Criteria
- 1553Adapter class wraps CommandStore entries in 1553 message framing
- Supports RT (Remote Terminal) addressing
- Message word structure follows MIL-STD-1553B
- Integration test with OBC model commanding a simulated equipment

## Implements
SVF-DEV-038

title: [BUS] Implement SpaceWire adapter
body:
## Objective
Bridge CommandStore entries to equipment model interfaces over a simulated SpaceWire network.

## Background
SpaceWire is commonly used for high-speed data interfaces between OBC and payload instruments in ESA missions.

## Acceptance Criteria
- SpWAdapter simulates SpaceWire logical address routing
- Supports RMAP (Remote Memory Access Protocol) read/write
- Integration test with payload model over SpaceWire

## Implements
SVF-DEV-038

title: [BUS] Implement CAN bus adapter
body:
## Objective
Bridge CommandStore entries to equipment model interfaces over a simulated CAN bus.

## Acceptance Criteria
- CANAdapter simulates CAN 2.0B frame structure
- Supports standard and extended identifiers
- Integration test with equipment model over CAN

## Implements
SVF-DEV-038

title: [BUS] Implement UART, I2C and WizardLink adapters
body:
## Objective
Bridge CommandStore entries to equipment model interfaces over UART, I2C, and WizardLink.

## Acceptance Criteria
- UARTAdapter, I2CAdapter, WizardLinkAdapter implemented
- Each simulates the respective framing and addressing
- Integration tests for each adapter type

## Implements
SVF-DEV-038

title: [SDB] Implement ICD parser and wiring YAML generator
body:
## Objective
Parse a spacecraft Interface Control Document (ICD) and automatically generate a mission wiring YAML file, removing the need for manual wiring definition.

## Background
Currently the wiring YAML is written manually by the engineer from the spacecraft ICD. This issue tracks automation of that step.

## Acceptance Criteria
- IcdParser class accepts a structured ICD format (TBD - Excel/CSV/XML)
- Generates a valid wiring YAML from parsed interface definitions
- Handles point-to-point and bus connections
- Integration test with sample ICD produces valid wiring YAML
- Output reviewed and manually adjustable

## Implements
SVF-DEV-004

title: [SDB] Define ICD input format specification
body:
## Objective
Define the input format that the ICD parser accepts. This must be agreed before implementation.

## Candidates
- Structured Excel (common in industry)
- CSV with defined column schema
- Custom YAML/JSON ICD format
- ECSS-E-TM-10-23 compliant XML

## Acceptance Criteria
- Format specification documented in docs/icd-format.md
- At least one sample ICD in the agreed format committed to examples/
- Format reviewed against real spacecraft ICDs

## Implements
SVF-DEV-004

title: [ABS] Implement RealtimeTickSource driven by RT_PREEMPT timer
body:
## Objective
Provide a real-time TickSource implementation driven by an RT_PREEMPT kernel timer for deterministic simulation stepping.

## Acceptance Criteria
- RealtimeTickSource implements TickSource interface
- Driven by POSIX timer (timer_create) on RT_PREEMPT patched Linux
- Jitter measured and documented
- Drop-in replacement for SoftwareTickSource at composition root
- Integration test confirms deterministic stepping within 1ms tolerance

## Implements
SVF-DEV-017

title: [ABS] Implement SharedMemorySyncProtocol
body:
## Objective
Provide a lock-free shared memory SyncProtocol for sub-millisecond tick acknowledgement latency.

## Acceptance Criteria
- SharedMemorySyncProtocol implements SyncProtocol interface
- Lock-free ring buffer implementation
- Latency measured and documented (target: <1ms)
- Drop-in replacement for DdsSyncProtocol

## Implements
SVF-DEV-018

title: [ABS] Implement HIL hardware bridge ModelAdapter
body:
## Objective
Provide a ModelAdapter implementation that bridges DDS topics to physical hardware interfaces for hardware-in-the-loop simulation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- HilModelAdapter implements ModelAdapter interface
- Bridges ParameterStore writes to physical output (e.g. SpaceWire card, CAN interface)
- Reads physical inputs and writes to CommandStore
- Integration test with representative hardware interface

## Implements
SVF-DEV-017

title: [BUS] Implement CCSDS/PUS command adapter
body:
## Objective
Format and validate CCSDS/PUS telecommands before writing to the CommandStore. Entry point for external ground-segment commanding.

## Acceptance Criteria
- PusCommandAdapter formats PUS-C service/subservice/parameter_id
- Validates TC against SRDB PUS mappings
- Writes validated commands to CommandStore
- Integration test with YAMCS or simulated ground station

## Implements
SVF-DEV-037

title: [BUS] Implement ParameterStoreDdsBridge for external inspection
body:
## Objective
Mirror ParameterStore values to DDS topics for external inspection tools and ground segment simulation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- ParameterStoreDdsBridge mirrors store writes to SVF/Telemetry/{variable}
- Read-only from external perspective
- Optional component — simulation runs without it
- Integration test confirms YAMCS or DDS subscriber receives telemetry

## Implements
SVF-DEV-034

title: [SDB] Implement XTCE 1.2 export adapter
body:
## Objective
Export the SRDB to XTCE 1.2 format for interoperability with ground segment tools.

## Acceptance Criteria
- XtceExporter serialises Srdb to valid XTCE 1.2 XML
- Covers SpaceSystem, TelemetryMetaData, CommandMetaData
- Output validated against XTCE 1.2 schema
- Integration test exports EPS baseline and validates

## Implements
SVF-DEV-097

title: [SDB] Implement MIB import adapter
body:
## Objective
Import an existing Mission Information Base (MIB) into the SRDB, enabling migration from legacy ground segment databases.

## Acceptance Criteria
- MibImporter parses pcf.dat, plf.dat, ccf.dat
- Produces ParameterDefinition objects
- Unmappable fields logged as warnings
- Integration test with sample MIB

## Implements
SVF-DEV-098
